common.title: Dimissio — European Layoff Tracker
common.description: Tracking layoffs across Europe, across all industries.

comingSoon.heading: Dimissio is coming soon
comingSoon.subheading: The European layoff tracker — cross-industry, data-driven, bilingual.

industry.heading: Layoffs in {industry}
industry.indexDescription: Browse layoffs by industry across Europe.

country.heading: Layoffs in {country}
country.disclaimer: Layoffs taking place in {country} — regardless of company headquarters.

newsletter.gdprNotice: By subscribing, you agree to receive regular email updates. You can unsubscribe at any time. For more information, see our Privacy Policy.
newsletter.title: Newsletter
newsletter.description: Get a monthly summary of European layoffs delivered to your inbox.
newsletter.bannerSuccess: Welcome! Your newsletter subscription is confirmed. You'll receive monthly updates from now on.
newsletter.bannerAlready: Your newsletter subscription is already active.
newsletter.gdprConsent: I consent to receiving the Dimissio newsletter. I can unsubscribe at any time.
newsletter.pendingDescription: We've sent you a confirmation email. Please click the link to activate your subscription.
newsletter.confirmedDescription: You're all set. You'll receive our monthly newsletter from now on.
newsletter.confirmErrorDescription: This confirmation link is invalid or has already been used.
newsletter.unsubscribedDescription: You've been removed from our newsletter. You won't receive any more emails.
newsletter.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.

submit.title: Submit a Layoff Tip
submit.description: Know about a layoff that's not listed yet? Let us know.
submit.detailsPlaceholder: What happened? How many people are affected? Any sources?
submit.gdprConsent: I consent to the processing of my data for reviewing this tip.
submit.thanksDescription: Your tip has been submitted. We'll review it as soon as possible.
submit.rateLimited: Too many submissions. Please try again later.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been removed.
